ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "firstName" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "lastName" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "userName" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "isActive" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "isDeleted" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is deleted */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updatedAt" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "lastActiveOn" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "userCategoryType" TEXT /* Category of the user (e.g., customer, manager, controller) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date the password was last changed */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "two_factor_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_userCategoryType FOREIGN KEY ("userCategoryType") REFERENCES user_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., customer, manager, controller) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES user_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, admin, moderator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of access or seniority associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "reset_date" TEXT /* Date the password reset was requested */,
  "new_password" TEXT /* New password for the user */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Unique token used for password reset verification */,
  "token_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the reset token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Date the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Date the session ended */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
